tools.name: search_companies
tools.description: Search verified companies across 18 African registries by name or registration number, results are ranked by quality (listed and best-detailed companies first). Returns each match's legal name, registration_no, country, status and registry source, plus the total count. To get the full record of any

tools.name: get_company
tools.description: Fetch one company's full record by country code and registration number, legal name, status, entity type, incorporation date, registry source, and any officers held.

tools.name: get_company_procurement
tools.description: List the government procurement contracts a company has won (from open-contracting data): the awarding body, contract title, value and date. Strong signal of what a company actually does.

tools.name: screen_sanctions
tools.description: Screen a company or person name against the OFAC SDN, OFAC Consolidated and UN Security Council lists. Returns any matches with a name-match confidence.
